question: What prior accepted DinoBrain memory/user direction defines completion for the DinoBrain OS, especially pre-response hooks, fail-closed behavior, start_task/get_context_pack/finish_task, closed-loop operation, and release/bootstrap expectations?

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented DinoBrain OS v2.1.0 closed-loop automation: hard pre-response hook block metadata, hook-side auto sync after preflight completion, finish_task auto-growth records, policy-based auto_sync commit/push tool, search_memory alias, installer env wiring for auto growth/sync, current Codex config/hook env update, and flow audit verification showing all 8 user-flow steps verified.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: The upgrade should make DinoBrain visibly prove hook operation, context usage, memory lifecycle, graph integrity, and sync risk.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented a post-install Codex hook approval flow. The installer now creates DinoBrain Codex Hook Approval.cmd and launches it after hook registration unless skipped. The helper detects stale Codex desktop processes, restarts/reopens Codex, copies /hooks to the clipboard, and shows instructions while preserving the requirement that the user manually trusts the hook. Updated the Windows setup UI with a checked-by-default approval flow option, added verification, updated uninstall cleanup, bumped version to 0.1.4, pushed main/tag, uploaded the v0.1.4 release ZIP, and verified the uploaded private asset hash.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented and deployed DinoBrain v2.0.1 stability fixes based on the QA review. Patched fail-closed Codex hook duplicate-lock behavior, added Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook registration and verification, expanded v2 action gates to the full OS tool contract, made behavior eval strict when golden cases are missing, added source chunk redaction/truncation guards, made node lifecycle apply real archive/hold/merge/provenance repair operations, handled os_begin_task context-pack failures as fail-closed task/gate records, fixed Observatory JSON graph fallback for v2 indexes, bumped app/installer version to 2.0.1, added regression coverage, pushed main and tag v2.0.1. Local release ZIP was built; direct GitHub Release upload could not run because no GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN is available in this shell.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Verified the installed/current DinoBrain OS loop against the user's 8-step flow. Codex MCP registration, UserPromptSubmit hook registration, hook simulation/probe, task/context pack creation, wiki_search, finish_task support, v2 verification, and git remotes are present. The complete loop is partially rather than fully autonomous: live current-thread hook injection was not observed before manual probe, model behavior cannot be runtime-enforced by DinoBrain, search_memory is not a separate tool, knowledge growth beyond accepted instances is not fully automatic, and git_sync remains dry-run/manual-review by policy.
